entry.title: New: RES26-126 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
ACCEPTING A GIFT OF ADDITIONAL MODIFICATIONS TO THE GHARIAL EXHIBIT PUMP REPLACEMENT PROJECT THAT INCLUDES AN AUTOMATIC SHUT-OFF FEATURE VALUED AT $4,995.56 TO THE CITY FROM THE HONOLULU ZOOLOGICAL SOCIETY FOR THE HONOLULU ZOO.

Latest action: Committee report and Resolution were adopted.

View on the council site
